seo.title: Care Staffing Guides & Insights | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Practical care staffing guides for registered managers and care providers across London — CQC compliance, hiring healthcare assistants, temporary staffing and more.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Practical guides on care-sector staffing, CQC compliance and hiring for registered managers and care providers across London.
fields.heading: Care Staffing Guides & Insights

fields.body: Our guides help registered managers and care providers hire and manage reliable care-sector staff. Each guide is written for real staffing decisions — from CQC-aligned vetting to covering short-notice rota gaps across Greater London.
fields.heading: Guides for care providers

items.body: The definitive guide to Care Home CPD — mapping continuous professional development to CQC quality statements and building inspection-ready staff evidence.
items.title: Care Home CPD & CQC Compliance

items.body: How care providers align staffing, evidence and supervision to the CQC single assessment framework and Regulation 18 this quarter.
items.title: CQC Compliance and Staffing

items.body: Step-by-step guide for care home managers on how to hire healthcare assistants with confidence — vetting, interviews, compliance and finding a specialist partner in London.
items.title: Hire Healthcare Assistants

items.body: Your guide to temporary staffing solutions for healthcare London — how the right agency can transform health and social care services with rapid, vetted, CQC-compliant placements.
items.title: Temporary Staffing Solutions

fields.sub: Tell us the shifts you need covered and we will match vetted workers to your service.
fields.heading: Need care staff now?
